stem: What is the slope of the graph of y = (1/3)(20x + 9) + 6x in the xy-plane?
rationale: Distribute and combine like terms: y = (20/3)x + 3 + 6x = (20/3 + 18/3)x + 3 = (38/3)x + 3. In slope-intercept form y = mx + b, the slope m is the coefficient of x, so the slope is 38/3 (approximately 12.67).
